modules.name: web
local_boundaries: UI must consume typed contracts from packages/sourcing-contracts.
Do not hide unavailable collector features; show explicit unavailable, pending, partial-failure states.
Do not call competitor APIs directly from browser UI.
quality_gates: Loading, empty, error, success, disabled, partial-failure, and cancelled states covered.

modules.name: api
local_boundaries: Routes only parse/auth/map responses; business logic lives in services.
Repositories own storage/search/external adapter IO.
Never proxy competitor API as an operational dependency.
quality_gates: Quota check/consume has idempotency and rollback notes.
Error envelope and requestId are stable.

modules.name: extension
local_boundaries: Chrome MV3 extension is the primary path for browser-session collectors.
Only allowlisted origins may send messages.
No token/cookie/credential logging.
quality_gates: Ping/status, progress/result, cancel, and partial-failure messages tested.

modules.name: sourcing-contracts
local_boundaries: Contracts are the source of truth for web/api/extension/collector boundaries.
Breaking changes require migration notes and fixtures.

modules.name: sourcing-core
local_boundaries: Pipeline stages remain explicit: collect, normalize, filter, dedupe, cache, imageSearch, save, summarize.
Coupang failure must not discard Naver/Gmarket/Auction results.

modules.name: market-collectors
local_boundaries: Collectors return MarketCollectResult only; no UI or storage side effects.
Coupang backend direct collector remains disabled unless experimental gate is approved.
Selectors and parsers must be fixture-backed.
quality_gates: Every market has raw and normalized fixture tests.

modules.name: reference-analysis
local_boundaries: Reference files are read-only evidence.
Extract roles/contracts/fixtures, not source implementation.
Every exclusion needs a role or risk note.
quality_gates: No raw proprietary source copied into implementation.

modules.name: fixtures
local_boundaries: Fixtures may encode shape and edge cases but not proprietary source text.
Sensitive values must be redacted.
quality_gates: Naver, Coupang, Gmarket, Auction, blocked, selector-empty, partial-failure fixtures exist.

workstreams.name: AUTOMETA Frontend Design
workstreams.objective: Build the web UI for sourcing jobs, keyword strategy, collector status, progress, partial-failure review, and result tables without dropping states.
use_when: Changing apps/web routes, UI components, tables, forms, filters, dashboard states, or smoke flows.
workflow: Start from typed contracts and reference role reports.
Map each backend/extension status to a visible Korean UI state.
Preserve cancel/progress/error/partial-failure actions.
Run typecheck/build or record blocker.
quality_gates: No hidden success for failed or unavailable collectors.
forbidden: Do not call competitor APIs from the frontend.
Do not hide collector failures to simplify the UI.

workstreams.name: AUTOMETA Backend API
workstreams.objective: Implement FastAPI backend routes for sourcing jobs, quota, keyword strategy, grid state, persistence/search adapters, and contract-shaped errors.
use_when: Changing apps/api routes, services, repositories, schemas, auth, quota, or persistence adapters.
workflow: Define or update request/response schema first.
Keep route/service/repository boundaries separate.
Replace competitor endpoints with AUTOMETA-owned APIs.
Add route contract tests for success, validation, partial failure, and cancel paths.
quality_gates: Quota check and consume are separate.
forbidden: Do not proxy api.bulsaja.com or opensearch proxy as a runtime dependency.
Do not log tokens/cookies/session values.

workstreams.name: AUTOMETA Sourcing Contracts
workstreams.objective: Own NormalizedProduct, SourcingRequest, MarketCollectResult, progress/log, job, quota, and extension message contracts.
use_when: Changing shared DTOs/types/schemas used by web, api, extension, or collectors.
workflow: Update contract first.
Map app.zip/reference fields to clean-room normalized names.
Add fixture compatibility tests.
Document migration for breaking changes.
forbidden: Do not import reference source names blindly.
Do not create market-specific result shapes for shared UI tables.

workstreams.name: AUTOMETA Sourcing Pipeline
workstreams.objective: Implement the sourcing pipeline as explicit stages: collect, normalize, filter, dedupe, cache, imageSearch, save, summarize.
use_when: Changing pipeline orchestration, filter rules, dedupe, cache, image-search, save, progress, or cancel behavior.
workflow: Keep each stage pure or clearly side-effect scoped.
Emit progress by market/stage/count.
Retain partial results when a market fails.
Test cancellation and retry behavior.
quality_gates: Partial market failure does not fail the whole keyword unless all markets fail.
forbidden: Do not collapse all errors into a generic failure.
Do not make image-search failure discard already valid collected products.

workstreams.name: AUTOMETA Market Collectors
workstreams.objective: Implement market collectors with clean contracts, fixture-backed parsers, explicit blocked/selector-empty errors, and session-boundary safety.
use_when: Changing Naver, Coupang, Gmarket, Auction, Taobao, AliExpress, parser, selector, or collector code.
workflow: Start from MarketCollectResult contract.
Create raw fixture and normalized expected fixture.
Add parser/collector tests before broadening selectors.
Record access/session boundary assumptions.
quality_gates: Each collector returns success/error with retryable flag.
forbidden: Do not bypass access controls or CAPTCHA.
Do not store credentials in fixtures.

workstreams.name: AUTOMETA Extension Bridge
workstreams.objective: Own Chrome MV3 web↔extension bridge, message allowlist, requestId mapping, task status store, progress/log/result/cancel channels, and browser-session collectors.
use_when: Changing extension background, content bridge, message contract, permissions, task status, or browser-session collection.
workflow: Define message type and payload contract first.
Verify origin/extension allowlist.
Store task state by requestId/jobId, not global mutable flags.
Guarantee tab cleanup in finally blocks.
quality_gates: Ping/status, single keyword, single link, progress, result, and cancel contracts tested.
forbidden: Do not reproduce wildcard postMessage trust.
Do not expose cookies/tokens to page context.

workstreams.name: AUTOMETA Reference Analysis
workstreams.objective: Analyze app.zip and extension references into role reports, contracts, fixtures, and decisions without copying source implementation.
use_when: Reading or summarizing reference files, extracting contracts, deciding keep/defer/reject, or updating reference docs.
workflow: List exact reference file path and role.
Extract behavior, input/output, error, and invariant.
Classify implement-now, defer-with-contract, or reject.
Update source-copy audit evidence.
quality_gates: Every app.zip file used has a role.
No proprietary source text copied to implementation.
forbidden: Do not treat bundled/generated chunks as maintainable source.
Do not import brand assets or proprietary copy.

workstreams.name: AUTOMETA Fixture Contract Tests
workstreams.objective: Build fixture-backed contract tests for raw market data, normalized products, pipeline partial failures, blocked/challenge pages, selector-empty cases, and message contracts.
use_when: Adding or changing fixtures, contract tests, characterization tests, or parser normalization expectations.
workflow: Create minimal redacted raw fixture.
Create normalized expected fixture.
Assert error code, retryable flag, counts, and requestId.
Run targeted and aggregate tests.
quality_gates: Fixtures cover Naver/Coupang/Gmarket/Auction and partial failure.
Tests fail on missing required normalized fields.
forbidden: Do not use live credentials in fixtures.
Do not use full proprietary source pages when reduced fixtures are sufficient.

workstreams.name: AUTOMETA Tool Selection
workstreams.objective: Choose between Web/API, Chrome Extension, Playwright, Electron, direct backend collectors, and manual session flows based on reliability, compliance, and operating cost.
use_when: Starting a new feature, collector, runtime path, or integration where tool choice changes feasibility or risk.
workflow: Classify whether the task needs browser session, server persistence, UI interaction, or local-only boundary.
Compare web/api, extension, Playwright, Electron, backend direct.
Record primary and fallback path.
Gate high-risk collectors behind experiments.
quality_gates: Coupang/Wing browser-session tasks route to extension unless explicitly approved.
Electron remains non-primary for initial web build.
forbidden: Do not default to Electron because app.zip used Electron.
Do not choose backend direct for sites requiring user browser session without policy review.

workstreams.name: AUTOMETA Clean-Room Audit
workstreams.objective: Verify generated or implemented work does not copy restricted source, depend on competitor APIs, leak secrets, or delete behavior without trace.
use_when: Before declaring completion, after large implementation slices, or when reference-derived logic is added.
workflow: Scan for competitor API domains and secret-like tokens.
Compare implementation against role reports for missing behavior.
Check generated manifest and module routing.
Record PASS/FAIL and patch until clean.
forbidden: Do not mark completion if any audit fails.
Do not suppress warnings without reason.

workstreams.name: AUTOMETA Keyword Strategy
workstreams.objective: Implement pre-listing keyword strategy using search volume, related keywords, competition, product count, and listing name/tag candidates before ad-report dependency.
use_when: Changing keyword analysis, product title generation, tag recommendation, competition score, or pre-listing strategy.
workflow: Define keyword input/output contract.
Keep search volume/related keyword APIs separate from post-sale ad reports.
Score candidates with explainable fields.
Show Korean e-commerce listing suggestions in UI.
quality_gates: Can produce candidates without ad report upload.
Score fields are visible and testable.
Coupang and Naver title/tag suggestions are separated.
forbidden: Do not require ad report upload for first keyword strategy.

workstreams.name: AUTOMETA Evidence And Release
workstreams.objective: Own final evidence pack, validation logs, risk register, and release handoff for Codex-generated work.
use_when: Finalizing generated skillsets, reporting validation, or preparing Codex handoff.
workflow: Collect commands run and outputs.
Record review/fix iterations.
List residual risks and personal input placeholders.
Package generated files and checksums.
forbidden: Do not claim unrun checks passed.

domain_terms.notes: Shared product shape after market-specific normalization.
Canonical async correlation ID. messageId is legacy alias only.
Market-level failure that preserves other market results.
Coupang collector primary path is Chrome Extension browser session.

boundaries: Reference code is read-only. Extract roles, contracts, fixtures, and invariants only.
AUTOMETA must not use competitor APIs as operational dependencies.
Coupang and Wing browser-session flows are extension-first unless explicit experimental approval exists.
Web UI, API, extension, contracts, core pipeline, and collectors must remain separated by module.
No token, cookie, access key, password, session, or private key in generated guidance or Git-tracked files.
quality_gates: Workstream skills are generated and routed to module AGENTS.md.
Reference structure map exists and includes app.zip priority files.
Secret and competitor API operational dependency scans pass.
AUTOMETA-specific docs are attached after generator output.
